evals.prompt: Track progress for the backend-developer agent running Phase 3 Build tasks for the user-auth feature. It needs to report sub-steps as it works through TASK-001 through TASK-005.
evals.expected_output: Status file created with IN_PROGRESS, sub-step transitions logged, COMPLETED on finish

assertions.name: status_file_created
assertions.description: Creates a status file in .claude/specs/user-auth/agent-status/

assertions.name: in_progress_initial
assertions.description: Initial status is IN_PROGRESS with timestamp

assertions.name: sub_steps_logged
assertions.description: Each task transition logged with timestamp

assertions.name: completed_on_finish
assertions.description: Final status updated to COMPLETED

evals.prompt: The design-team agent failed during Phase 2. Write a FAILED status with error details so the orchestrator can debug.
evals.expected_output: Status file with FAILED status, error message, and context about what went wrong

assertions.name: failed_status
assertions.description: Status set to FAILED

assertions.name: error_details
assertions.description: Error message and context included

assertions.name: timestamp
assertions.description: Failure timestamp recorded

assertions.name: last_successful_step
assertions.description: Notes which sub-step was the last successful one

evals.prompt: Find all stalled agents in the current pipeline run. Check for any agent-status files stuck at IN_PROGRESS.
evals.expected_output: Grep query finding IN_PROGRESS status files with timestamps to identify stalls

assertions.name: grep_query
assertions.description: Uses Grep to search for IN_PROGRESS in agent-status files

assertions.name: identifies_stalls
assertions.description: Flags agents that have been IN_PROGRESS too long

assertions.name: reports_timestamps
assertions.description: Shows when each agent started

assertions.name: actionable_output
assertions.description: Suggests next steps (retry, escalate, or investigate)

evals.prompt: The security-auditor agent is running Phase 5. It has 3 sub-steps: secrets scan, dependency audit, OWASP review. Track its progress through all 3 sub-steps.
evals.expected_output: Status file with 3 sub-step transitions, each timestamped

assertions.name: three_substeps
assertions.description: All 3 sub-steps (secrets, deps, OWASP) recorded

assertions.name: timestamps_per_step
assertions.description: Each sub-step has a start/complete timestamp

assertions.name: final_status
assertions.description: Overall status COMPLETED after all 3 sub-steps

assertions.name: structured_format
assertions.description: Status file follows the skill's prescribed format

evals.prompt: Generate a progress summary across all agents in the current pipeline. Show which phases are complete, in progress, and pending.
evals.expected_output: Dashboard-style summary reading all agent-status files and progress.md

assertions.name: reads_all_status_files
assertions.description: Scans all agent-status directories for current state

assertions.name: phase_summary
assertions.description: Shows each phase's status (complete/in-progress/pending)

assertions.name: active_agents
assertions.description: Lists currently running agents

assertions.name: failures_highlighted
assertions.description: Any FAILED agents highlighted for attention
